allow: Bash(aws dynamodb create-table --table-name marketpulse_inventory --attribute-definitions AttributeName=category,AttributeType=S AttributeName=sku_id,AttributeType=S --key-schema AttributeName=category,KeyType=HASH AttributeName=sku_id,KeyType=RANGE --billing-mode PAY_PER_REQUEST --region ap-south-1)

Bash(aws dynamodb create-table --table-name marketpulse_forecasts --attribute-definitions AttributeName=category,AttributeType=S AttributeName=generated_at,AttributeType=S --key-schema AttributeName=category,KeyType=HASH AttributeName=generated_at,KeyType=RANGE --billing-mode PAY_PER_REQUEST --region ap-south-1)

Bash(aws dynamodb create-table --table-name marketpulse_recommendations_log --attribute-definitions AttributeName=category,AttributeType=S AttributeName=timestamp,AttributeType=S --key-schema AttributeName=category,KeyType=HASH AttributeName=timestamp,KeyType=RANGE --billing-mode PAY_PER_REQUEST --region ap-south-1)
